title: sulcorebutia neocorroana
intro: Sulcorebutia neocorroana is a species of cactus native to Bolivia, belonging to the Cactaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Sulcorebutia neocorroana are typically made from its leaves and stems, and are often used in folk medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
